message:
test(fwc): expand unit-test coverage across six fwc subsystems

Add extensive edge-case and boundary-condition tests to:

- audit.rs (+1128 lines): cohort assignment edge cases (empty, case-
  sensitive, special chars), compliance matrix cloning, score
  arithmetic boundaries, audit-report serialization roundtrips,
  and category/severity exhaustive coverage.

- doctor.rs (+942 lines): severity label/display/ordering/serde
  roundtrips, diagnosis category exhaustive coverage, health-report
  builder edge cases, recommendation priority, and multi-check
  aggregation scenarios.

- new_cmd.rs (+1033 lines): ConnectorArchetype serde roundtrips and
  kebab-case serialization, scaffold template content validation for
  every archetype, manifest generation correctness, test-harness
  template completeness, and workspace member injection.

- routing.rs (+764 lines): HealthState/SafetyRank clone/copy/hash/
  debug/parse edge cases, latency_score and preference_score boundary
  values, SignalWeights/RoutingConfig/ScoreBreakdown trait impls,
  compute_score isolation per signal weight, rank_candidates stable
  sort and recommendation invariants, PreferenceStore persistence
  lifecycle, and normalized score range proofs.

- supply_chain_cmd.rs (+1031 lines): SupplyChainEvaluation clone
  fidelity, VerificationPipeline step-count and verdict consistency,
  SBOM/attestation field preservation, policy boundary combinations,
  evidence digest stability, and SLSA level threshold edge cases.

- zone_scope.rs (+830 lines): ZoneId extended construction (long
  strings, unicode, special chars), hash/ord consistency,
  well-known zone recognition, ScopePolicy parse/display/serde
  roundtrips, ZoneAccessDecision exhaustive variant coverage,
  evaluate_access matrix tests, and scope-rule conflict resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
